innateAbility.name: Apex Predator
innateAbility.description: Lycan and his player-controlled units have outgoing damage amplification bonus to neutral creeps per hero level.

abilities.name: Summon Wolves
abilities.description: Summons a pack of wolves to fight for Lycan.In time, these wolves have Permanent Invisibility and Cripple.

abilities.name: Howl
abilities.description: Strike fear while reducing their armor and attack damage of all enemy units within the radius of Lycan and his wolves.

abilities.name: Feral Impulse
abilities.description: Grants bonus attack damage and bonus health regeneration to Lycan and all of his player-controlled units.

abilities.name: Shapeshift
abilities.description: Assumes his lupine form.The lycanthropy sets his base attack range, and grants bonus base night vision for the entire duration.

abilities.name: Wolf Bite
abilities.description: Grants the unit-targeted allied hero all of Shapeshift's Wolf Form ability values of its corresponding level after its transformation time.Within the proximity distance, the allied hero's lifesteal in Wolf Form heals Lycan, and Lycan's lifesteal heals the affected allied hero.

talents.left: x0.75 Summon Wolves Base Attack Time
